task.role: You are a Senior Go Engineer with expertise in concurrent systems and microservices. Implement Task 23 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Set up Go project with gRPC services and grpc-gateway for REST API
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 2 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Initialize Go module with gRPC dependencies
2. Define protobuf schemas for all services
3. Generate Go code and grpc-gateway handlers
4. Set up basic server with health checks
5. Add structured logging with zap

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-23): Admin API gRPC Foundation (Grizz - Go/gRPC)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
gRPC server starts successfully, health checks respond, protobuf compilation works, basic service calls succeed

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
